amex.note: Avios currency — pools freely on avios.com across british, qatar, and finnair; a transfer into any of the three funds awards in all.
Choice Privileges is a current Amex hotel partner (verified 2026-07-13); transfers 1:1.
Amex adds a federal excise-tax offset fee (about $0.60 per 1,000 points, capped at $99) on this US carrier. Transfer takes up to 48h.
Amex devalued this from 1:1 to 1:0.8 on 2025-09-16.
